We need to ensure we output only the translation. The translation of "Write your comment..." into Spanish (Spain) is "Escribe tu comentario..." or "Escribe tu comentario...". So the translation: "Escribe tu comentario...". Should we keep ellipsis? Yes, the original has ellipsis "...". So "Escribe tu comentario...".
Thus output:
``` Escribe tu comentario... ```

So "Write your comment..." is not a proper noun, so we can translate. So we output "Escribe tu comentario...".

``` Escribe tu comentario... ```
